title: Tattoo Gift Certificate Template, Dark Gothic Luxury Style, Editable Canva Gift Voucher for Ink Studio, Printable Gift Card
description:
Looking for a professional, striking way to offer gift certificates at your tattoo studio? This dark luxury gothic gift certificate template will elevate your brand and impress your clients from the moment they receive it.

Designed specifically for tattoo artists and ink studios who want to stand out with premium, editable gift vouchers that match their aesthetic.

✨ WHAT'S INCLUDED:
• 1 high-resolution Canva template (300 DPI print quality)
• Dark gothic luxury design with elegant typography
• Fully editable text fields for studio name, amount, recipient details
• Standard gift certificate size (8.5" x 5.5")
• Instant download PDF with Canva link

🎨 HOW TO EDIT:
1. Click the Canva link provided in your download
2. Customize with your studio name, logo, and gift details
3. Change colors, fonts, or text to match your brand
4. Download as PDF for printing or PNG for digital use
5. No design experience needed - ready to edit in minutes

💀 FEATURES:
• Professional dark aesthetic perfect for tattoo studios
• High-contrast design that looks stunning printed or digital
• Easy-to-read layout with space for all essential details
• Matches gothic, alternative, and luxury tattoo studio branding
• Commercial license included for unlimited studio use

🖤 PERFECT FOR:
• Tattoo studios wanting premium gift certificate options
• Last-minute holiday or birthday gifts for tattoo enthusiasts
• Studios launching gift card programs
• Promoting your services during peak gifting seasons
• Building client loyalty with professional presentation

❓ FAQ:
• Can I change the colors? Yes, all elements are fully customizable in Canva
• What size is this template? Standard 8.5" x 5.5" gift certificate size, perfect for printing
• Do I need Canva Pro? No, this template works with free Canva accounts

📋 PLEASE NOTE:
 This is a digital download template file. No physical product will be shipped. You'll receive instant access to edit and download your customized gift certificates immediately after purchase.
source_why: Gift certificates are the #1 selling digital template for tattoo studios. High demand, low competition for premium dark/gothic aesthetic. Average seller price £4.99-£7.99. Buyers searching for editable, professional gift cards they can customise in Canva.
